SEARCH
Package io.github.senthilganeshs.fj.typeclass

Interface Traversable<W>

Type Parameters:
W - The witness type of the traversable functor.
All Superinterfaces:
Functor<W>
public interface Traversable<W> extends Functor<W>
A typeclass for functors that can be traversed from left to right, performing an action on each element.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    default <G, A> Higher<G,Higher<W,A>>
    sequence(Applicative<G> applicative, Higher<W,Higher<G,A>> fga)
    Flips a nested structure (e.g., F<G<A>> to G<F<A>>).
    <G, A, B> Higher<G,Higher<W,B>>
    traverse(Applicative<G> applicative, Function<A,Higher<G,B>> fn, Higher<W,A> fa)
    Traverses the structure, applying an effectful function to each element and collecting the results.

    Methods inherited from interface io.github.senthilganeshs.fj.typeclass.Functor

    map

  • Method Details

    • traverse

      <G, A, B> Higher<G,Higher<W,B>> traverse(Applicative<G> applicative, Function<A,Higher<G,B>> fn, Higher<W,A> fa)
      Traverses the structure, applying an effectful function to each element and collecting the results.

      Flips a nested structure (e.g., F<G<A>> to G<F<A>>).
